title: dryopteris × boottii
intro: Dryopteris × boottii, also known as the autumn fern or Boott's fern, is a hybrid species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Dryopteris × boottii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Dryopteris × boottii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or extracting the active compounds with a solvent like ethanol.
